data.title: Solana's SOL Could See Nearly 6% Price Swing as Whales Dump Coins Before U.S. Jobs Data
data.description:
• Solana's SOL token may experience a 6% price swing in the next 24 hours, Volmex's implied volatility index suggests.
  • Whales dumped coins early today.
  • U.S. job data could influence interest-rate cut expectations, potentially impacting cryptocurrency prices.

data.title: Coinbase Institutional Is Close to Offering XRP Futures
data.description:
• Coinbase Institutional has filed with the CFTC to offer futures contracts tied to Ripple's XRP token.
  • The XRP futures will be cash-settled, margined contracts, trading under the ticker XRL, and are expected to go live on April 21, 2025.
  • This product will be the second CFTC-regulated XRP futures after Bitnomial's launch in March.

data.title: BTC, ETH, XRP Set For a Near-Term Bounce as Attention Turns to Rate Cuts
data.description:
• Crypto markets experienced high volatility following U.S. tariff announcements, with major tokens initially surging and then slumping.
  • Investors moved large volumes of Bitcoin, ETH, and XRP into exchanges, indicating a readiness to sell amid economic uncertainty.
  • Markets are anticipating the U.S. non-farm payroll report, which could influence Federal Reserve rate cut expectations and impact crypto prices.

data.title: TON's Dramatic Volatility Signals Market Uncertainty
data.description:
• TON experienced a 15.5% price drop from $4.20 to $3.55, with 48-hour volatility reaching 21.3% annualized.
  • Toncoin has since rebounded, climbing 7% in the past 24 hours to $4.13, with venture capital firms now holding over $400 million in TON.
  • Major countries' trade disputes and geopolitical tensions continue to influence crypto markets, with bitcoin fluctuating around $82,000-$83,500.

data.title: Crypto-Friendly Prime Broker Hidden Road in Active Takeover Talks: Sources
data.description:
• Prime broker Hidden Road has received takeover interest from a crypto native firm, according to sources, with talks ongoing.
  • Investment banking firm FT Partners is advising Hidden Road, the people said.

data.title: Dogecoin Volatility Surge: From Stability to Dramatic Decline
data.description:
• DOGE experienced significant price volatility with a dramatic 12.7% range ($0.179-$0.156) over the analyzed period.
  • The 48-hour annualized volatility reached 86.3%, substantially above market norms, driven by a sharp sell-off on April 2-3.
  • Technical analysis reveals a breakdown of key support at $0.165, with high-volume selling pressure establishing new resistance levels.

data.title: Investment Firm Republic to Acquire Crypto Trader INX Digital for Up to $60M
data.description:
• Republic is set to acquire crypto trading firm INX Digital at a valuation of up to $60 million.
  • Already an existing shareholder in INX after acquiring a 9.5% stake in 2023, Republic will integrate itself fully in INX's operations following completion of the transaction.
  • Republic said the acquisition will strengthen its position as a blockchain investor.

data.title: WisdomTree Expands Institutional Tokenized Fund Platform to Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base and Optimism
data.description:
• WisdomTree is expanding its institutional investment platform WisdomTree Connect beyond Ethereum to Arbitrum, Avalanche, Base and Optimism.
  • The platform now offers 13 tokenized funds across various investment strategies such as money market, equity index, and fixed income, all registered with the SEC.
  • Asset tokenization has the potential to become a trillion-dollar market as traditional financial firms increasingly place financial instruments on blockchain rails for operational gains.

data.title: Bitcoin Nears $80K but 'Turning Point' in Sight, Suggests Analyst
data.description:
• Bitcoin is flirting with the $80,000 as markets plunge following the Trump tariff plan.
  • Bitcoin's decline highlights its correlation with traditional risk markets, but perhaps investors might soon highlight its store-of-value properties, said LMAX's Joel Kruger.
  • JPMorgan, however, suggested otherwise, seeing a continuation of gold's outperformance over bitcoin.

data.title: USDC Navigates Global Market Stress With Minimal Volatility
data.description:
• USDC demonstrated stability despite global trade tensions, maintaining a narrow trading range of just 0.083% with an annualized volatility of 1.58%.
  • Circle filed for NYSE IPO under ticker "CRCL," revealing Coinbase receives 50% of USDC reserve revenue in a significant financial arrangement.
  • Binance reported record stablecoin deposits with over $33 billion in stablecoin inflows, including $3.38 billion in USDC, as traders seek stability amid market uncertainty.
